case_metadata.user_request: Find the lowest-energy adsorption configuration for acetaldehyde on the provided surface.

plan.reasoning: History is empty so this is the first proposal. SMILES CC=O matches acetaldehyde with no radicals or hybridization mismatch. Carbonyl O (index 2) has lone pairs and is the preferred donor for initial Molecule-type adsorption. Start with the most chemically plausible ontop site on Ti (oxophilic).
